invariantResults.evidence: All inline code elements in prose use backticks: `ClientSecret` (line 71), `value="@provider.Name"` (line 85), `MemberInfo` (line 109), `ClaimTypes` and `ClaimTypes.Email` (line 111), `ClaimTypes.GivenName` (line 149). The modified type names `ApplicationRole` and `ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole>` appear only inside {% code %} blocks, not in prose, so backtick formatting is N/A for the changed lines.

Code examples are broken into logical sections: Identity configuration (line 46), Google authentication scope (line 115), claims mapping (line 141), cookie expiration (line 166), secrets storage (lines 192, 204). External code_link references (lines 81, 93, 95, 97) further segment the authentication flow. additionalFindings.evidence: Headings follow h2 -> h3 -> h4 progression without skipped levels. 8 h2 sections, 5 h3 subsections, 2 h4 subsections. All h4 headings ('Sites hosted on Microsoft Azure', 'Private cloud hosting') appear under h3 'On production sites'.

All required fields present: title, persona, identifier (uIouCw), order (200), license (1), redirect_from (x/uIouCw). Optional toc and related_pages also present and correctly formatted. toc uses only supported params minHeadingLevel/maxHeadingLevel (INV-jekyll-010).

All Liquid tags properly paired: 6 {% code %}/{% endcode %} pairs, 4 {% code_link %} self-closing tags, 1 {% tip %}/{% endtip %}, 1 {% info %}/{% endinfo %}, 1 {% image %}. All code blocks have lang attribute with valid values (csharp, powershell). All code_link tags have source and lang attributes (INV-jekyll-002, INV-jekyll-014).

Both callouts have bold titles on separate lines: '**Storing application secrets**' (line 69) and '**Enabling created accounts**' (line 101). Neither callout contains its type name as text (INV-callout-002, INV-callout-003). Severity matches content: tip for best practice, info for important note (INV-callout-004).

All external links use {% external_link %} with linkText (INV-crossref-005, INV-crossref-006). All internal page links use {% page_link %} with identifiers (tYouCw, uoouCw, oAL9Cg). In-page links use {% inpage_link %} correctly (INV-crossref-001). No vague link text.

The modified code block (lines 46-65) uses spaces consistently — no tabs detected on lines 48-55. The new line 53 .AddRoleStore<ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole>>() maintains 8-space indentation consistent with adjacent method chain lines 52, 54, 55.
All headings use sentence case per INV-style-001. Proper nouns correctly capitalized: 'Microsoft Azure' (line 217), 'HTTPS' (line 158, standard abbreviation).
Ordered lists used for sequential steps (lines 37-42, 85-89, 136-137, 177-183). Unordered lists used for non-sequential items (lines 23-26, 219-226). Follows INV-structure-006.

Uses 'sign in' (verb form, lines 17, 89) and 'sign-in' as modifier. Uses 'visitors' for anonymous users and 'users' contextually. No instances of 'log in', 'click', 'please', or 'choose' violations found.

The attempt 2 change is confined to two lines within the first {% code %} block: line 48 (NoOpApplicationRole -> ApplicationRole) and line 53 (NoOpApplicationRoleStore -> ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole>). Both changes are purely within code content. No new prose, headings, links, or structural elements were introduced. No new style violations possible from this delta.
